creator: egypcio@FreeBSD.org
text:
as I did restart one of the ntpd processes on a stable/12 machine yesterday, I can share its information now (after posting this, I should setup a lab with the same hardware running HEAD and get the data tomorrow).

FreeBSD 12.1-STABLE r354893 amd64 1201502

% cat /var/db/ntp/ntpd.drift
134.745
